title.en: At this time, several Extreme Dao creatures wer...

content.en:
At this time, several Extreme Dao creatures were chatting.

"Hmph, we've been here for a long time, and the Lord of the Ice Phoenix still hasn't seen us!"

"The Lord of the Ice Phoenix probably doesn't think that we can cure her heir, so he is not in a hurry to see us. "

"There's no way, what is the strength of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, who cares about us, even the Lord of the Dragon Ape, isn't he waiting with us?"

The Lord of the Dragon Ape is the only Perfect Master of the Void Realm here, and he is also waiting here at this moment.

"There's no way, it's been a long time since the Lord of the Ice Phoenix released the mission, and the Extreme Dao creatures who came to treat it came batch after batch, but there was no way, and the Lord of the Ice Phoenix was probably about to be completely disappointed!"

"Keep waiting, in fact, I'm not sure, I can only see, maybe I'll be lucky and find a way!"

Then, several Extreme Creatures continued to wait.

After some time, another Extreme Creature came.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry, he continued to wait.

Finally, after a long time, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix sent a super-perfect controller to meet them.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian followed this super-perfect master to a time and space.

Here, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix appeared.

Rumble!!!!

A huge ice phoenix appeared in this space-time, and the terrifying aura brought all the surrounding extreme rules to a standstill.

"It's so powerful!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The other party is afraid that if he blows, he can destroy a super-perfect controller, this is the strength of the perfect controller of the real realm!

"Do you have a way to cure my daughter?"

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix asked.

It is very difficult for an Extreme Creature to give birth to an heir, especially for a person like her who is a perfect controller of the True Realm, and if it is to give birth to an heir, it will be even more difficult.

But once an heir is born, the potential is very high.

Therefore, she will do whatever it takes to save her daughter.

"Lord of the Ice Phoenix, I need to see your daughter!"

The Lord of the Dragon Ape pleaded.

"Yes!"

With a wave of his hand, an ice-blue egg appeared in the void.

The eyes of several extreme creatures looked at the egg, and their colors suddenly changed.

"The origin of the Extreme Dao has been damaged, and the rules of the Extreme Dao are chaotic!"

They were shocked.

What this means, they know very well, if it is not supported by the power of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, then this egg is a dead egg!

Moreover, the origin of the Extreme Dao is the foundation of the Extreme Dao creatures, and coupled with the chaos of the Extreme Dao rules in the body, this is almost impossible to bring!

"Say, what's the solution?"

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix asked again.

"Lord of the Ice Phoenix, can the Azure Gold Liquid heal your daughter?" asked the Lord of the Dragon Ape.

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix said helplessly: "Do you think I can't think of the Azure Gold Liquid, with my status and status, it is naturally not difficult to get the Azure Gold Liquid, but it is useless." Even a treasure that is better than the Azure Gold Liquid, I have also used it, and the effect is not great, it just restores some vitality, and it can't change the fundamentals!"

"Lord of the Ice Phoenix, with all due respect, this situation cannot be cured by treating the injury, the origin of the Extreme Dao and the rules of the Extreme Dao are chaotic, and the rules of the Extreme Dao need to be adjusted fundamentally, and this process will fail if you are not careful, it is too dangerous!

A super-perfect master, the Extreme Dao Creature, said immediately.

"I'll give up too!"

One by one, the super-perfect masters gave up, they didn't dare to try to heal, otherwise if they failed, it would aggravate the damage, and the Lord of the Ice Phoenix would definitely not let them go.

So, they didn't dare to try.

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix was immediately disappointed when he saw them give up one by one.

However, she also got used to it.

At this time, Ye Tian said: "Lord of the Ice Phoenix, I am sure, but it will take a certain amount of time!"

"Underage Extreme Creature!"

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix stared at Ye Tian, thinking that Ye Tian was talking big, not even a perfect controller such as Chao, and he dared to say that he was sure?

"How sure are you?"

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix asked.

"Lord of the Ice Phoenix, I can't guarantee anything now, give me some time, and I'll prove to the Lord of the Ice Phoenix that the Lord of the Ice Phoenix has nothing to lose anyway. Ye Tian said.

"Okay, I'll give you a chance, but I hope you don't fool me, otherwise you know the consequences!" the Lord of the Ice Phoenix said coldly.

Several other Extreme Dao creatures looked at Ye Tian and felt that Ye Tian was looking for death.

Although the Lord of the Ice Phoenix is very merciful, she will not show mercy to the Extreme Creatures who dare to fool her, and there have been Extreme Creatures who fooled the Lord of the Ice Phoenix before, and they were killed by the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the other Extreme Dao creatures all left one by one.

Those Extreme Dao creatures didn't communicate with Ye Tian, but left one by one.

For them, Ye Tian will definitely die in the future.

......

In the following days, Ye Tian was ready to think about how to treat the daughter of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, first of all, he had to copy the daughter of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, and then start to sort out the rules of the Extreme Dao by himself and repair the origin of the Extreme Dao.

After all, he must know himself best, and this is the only way to save the daughter of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

"Then let's do it!"

Ye Tian decided.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian dismantled the Void Sparrow to copy the body, and then began to copy the Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg of the Ice Phoenix Lord's daughter.

Soon, this Extreme Dao Ice Phoenix Egg was copied.

As soon as it was copied, this Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg was about to die.

After all, the Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg was not dead, it was completely supported by the power of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, and Ye Tian did not have the blessing of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix!

However, Ye Tian can open this Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg.

Immediately, Ye Tian gave some perfect-level ancestral endowments that could be used to recover injuries to this Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg.

In this way, this Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg can use these perfect level ancestral endowments to recover injuries and exempt damage, so that this Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg remains immortal.

"It's okay, so you won't die!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief and said.

Immediately, he began to study this Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg.

Sorting out the rules of the Pole Dao and repairing the origin of the Pole Dao, this process will be troublesome if it is one wrong step.

During the research process, Ye Tian failed again and again, and soon the egg died completely and could never recover.

"Go ahead and copy an Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he copied the Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg and began to study it.

In this way, failure after failure, replication after copying, and the long years passed slowly.

Before you know it, five million eternal years have passed.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian had initial results.
